subcodes.first_line: O learned in the school of true understanding and the nightingale of the garden of certitude, the candle is lit and the light of the Abha Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان عرفان و عندلیب بوستان ایقان شمع روشن است و انوار ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @symbolism, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
